subject: rbc and td bank swaps with enron canada

emails.subject: RBC and TD Bank Swaps with Enron Canada
emails.subject_base: RBC and TD Bank Swaps with Enron Canada
emails.body: RBC and TD Bank Swaps with Enron Canada I believe that, as you requested, I have now had executed and returned to you by fax copies of the commodity swaps between Enron Canada and each of RBC, TD Bank and Risk Management as well as the two rate swaps between Enron Canada and each of RBC and TD. I believe the only other confirm requiring Enron Canada's execution in this transaction is the back-to-back rate swap between Enron Canada and ENA, whereby Enron Canada swaps the floating rate for the fixed rate with ENA. You can send that confirm directly to my attention by e-mail and I will get it signed and sent back to you. I understand that you will be attending to obtaining counterparty execution of these confirms. Could you do me a favor and, when you receive the fully executed confirms back from the respective counterparties, fax fully executed copies of all the confirms to my attention at 403-974-6707. I am aggregating copies of all the documents relating to this financing for our files and will need the executed confirms as part of that process. Thanks Greg Johnston

emails.subject: Re: RBC and TD Bank Swaps with Enron Canada
emails.subject_base: RBC and TD Bank Swaps with Enron Canada
emails.body: Greg, The matrix I was given doesn't mention an internal rate swap. I'll have to check with John Griffith in Structuring. Sara, Do you know if the Interest Rate swap is also being backed out to RMT? Thanks Joe Greg Johnston 10/02/2000 02:54 PM

emails.subject: Re: RBC and TD Bank Swaps with Enron Canada
emails.subject_base: RBC and TD Bank Swaps with Enron Canada
emails.body: Greg, In talking to the Interest Rate group. They did not do a Rate Swap between ECC and RISKMANTRA. I've been told that they simply hedged the cashflow rather than doing the internal interest rate swap. This info came from Clara Carrington. Thanks, Joe Forwarded by Larry Joe Hunter/HOU/ECT on 10/03/2000 02:40 PM From: Sara Shackleton on 10/03/2000 08:45 AM
